description: Configure the Wazuh manager to monitor the custom application log file '/var/log/legacy_fin_app.log' using the syslog format and enable the global 'logall_json' setting. Simulate a log event by appending '2024-01-01 12:00:00 LegacyFinApp: INFO Transaction ID 998877 completed successfully by user_auditor' to the monitored file. Extract the resulting JSON event from the Wazuh archives and save the full JSON object to '/home/ga/archive_proof.json'.
